body: Makes more sense as we usually work with °C (probably true for most of oceanography).
title: Change default NetCDF temperature units: K to °C

body:
This pull request eliminates the need to have `close(ncoutputwriter)` at the end of the scripts. The closing is handled by the `run!` method of the `Simulation` type.

Resolves #650  
Also fixes #651
title: Simulation handles closing of `NetCDFOutputWriter`

body:
This PR fixes an error in the Adams-Bashforth time-stepping algorithm so that tendencies from time-step `n-1` are computed correctly. This PR also computes tendencies after a time-step is complete rather than at the beginning of a time-step.

This change causes the regression tests to fail. We should merge this change and correct the regression tests in a subsequent PR.
title: Store tendencies correctly after time-step

body: This PR builds off #664 and rewrites the regression tests to match changes made in #664 to the time-stepping algorithm. It also does some minor refactoring and cleanup of the regression test scripts.
title: Rewrite regression tests
